notes:
Running this without any tweaks results in the playable ground being nothing but hot pink, which doesn't work for game play.  Enabling all the tweaks makes the game render normally, and seems generally playable via keyboard now that the ground is viewable.  

Attempting to use my logitech F310 controller, the menus began randomly going in different directions on their own, and forcing through that to gameplay results in the character running around wildly, so gamepad/joystick function seems broken.
title: Overlord: Fellowship of Evil
